# Release Readiness Pack Template

- `venture_id`
- gate_b_decision_ref
- target environment
- release owner
- rollback owner
- implementation plan reference
- review_verdict_ref
- qa_verdict_ref
- rollback_plan_ref
- deploy path
- rollback path
- smoke-test path
- open launch-critical risks
- final PASS / FAIL / RETRY / ESCALATE verdict
- launch_handoff_ready: yes | no
